transcript.text: Living in Lafayette, V-LOG, the 23rd of October, 2010.
I always yawn whenever I start talking.
I haven't yawned since the last time I did a YouTube video.
It's crazy.
So let's see, what did I do today?
Got up, went to work,
And came back at 2.30 or something like that.
Took a little nap.
Because I was up late last night.
And then I did a little bit of,
I put some more rug on my bed,
And then I went on a bike ride,
But I got my very first bike ride since 626, June 26th.
And then I got a flat, obviously.
And I wanted to go to Lyons.
I made it like halfway, I got a flat,
And then I realized I only had two patches left,
So that I got spooked and came home,
Because I didn't want to get three flats when I went home,
And then I'd be screwed.
But then I found out later that I had a bike bag under my seat
That had a whole extra tube and a patch kit.
I didn't see that bike bag because I had the big bag.
I'll show you.
I have that big bag on the back of my bike.
I'm going to keep that bag on my bike.
And just not take it off,
Because it's a cool way to store stuff.
